title: noronhia cochleata
intro: Noronhia cochleata is a species of flowering plant in the family Scophulariaceae, commonly known as the 'Devil's Tree'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including the ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Noronhia cochleata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
